\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4213 introduces Breathing Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_{\text{breathing}}^2 = \omega_0^2 + \omega_{\text{Alfvén}}^2 - i\gamma\omega_{\text{breathing}} \end{equation}
